inputs.label: Sample Mean (x̄)
inputs.businessContext: The arithmetic average of observed sample data.

businessContext_i18n.en: The arithmetic average of observed sample data.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das arithmetische Mittel der beobachteten Stichprobendaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Moyenne arithmétique des données observées de l'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: El promedio aritmético de los datos de la muestra observada.

inputs.label: Hypothesized Mean (μ₀)
inputs.businessContext: The null hypothesis value for the population mean.

businessContext_i18n.en: The null hypothesis value for the population mean.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Popülasyon ortalaması için sıfır hipotezi değeri.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur de la moyenne de la population sous l'hypothèse nulle.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor de la hipótesis nula para la media poblacional.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة المتوسط المجتمعي تحت الفرضية الصفرية.

inputs.label: Sample Standard Deviation (s)
inputs.businessContext: A measure of variability in the sample data.

businessContext_i18n.en: A measure of variability in the sample data.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ein Maß für die Variabilität in den Stichprobendaten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Mesure de la variabilité dans les données de l'échantillon.
businessContext_i18n.es: Una medida de variabilidad en los datos de la muestra.

inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Number of observations in the sample.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of observations in the sample.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Beobachtungen in der Stichprobe.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de observaciones en la muestra.
